purpose: Library-level definition for the first 16 stable GIF / motion components. Each component must be confirmed by scenario, tags, reference, assist inputs, guards, and delivery form.
design_md: Design MD is the reusable design prototype: clean layout, timing, color family, motion type, and no SKU-specific content.
adapted_md: Adapted MD is the SKU-specific version: product color, product inset, text plan, evidence, and module placement are applied.

cards.when_to_use: Use when the page needs the fastest premium upgrade and the product can sit beside a dark brand block.
cards.how_to_use: Use Design MD for the black-gold structure, then create Adapted MD by inserting a product inset, short headline, and 2-3 chips. Embed final GIF as one full-width image.
cards.design_md: Clean dark background, gold accent line, local brand text, slow diagonal shine sweep.
cards.adapted_md: Product image is cropped into a right-side inset only; do not use a noisy full product image as the whole background.
cards.reference: Good-store full-width GIF banner with dark background and one strong visual hook.

cards.when_to_use: Use for EV, electronics, tools, cables, or products with blue/cool tone identity.
cards.how_to_use: Start from Design MD blue tech banner. Adapt by selecting one product detail image or product inset and replacing text chips with SKU facts.
cards.design_md: Dark navy base, blue accent, tech shine sweep, product inset frame.
cards.adapted_md: Blue accent is kept if product imagery or category supports a tech tone; otherwise downgrade to black-gold.
cards.reference: Good-store tech GIF banners and 1140 px single-column detail image rhythm.

cards.when_to_use: Use when the buyer needs three clear actions or three top benefits.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD has three cards and one active highlight. Adapted MD replaces labels with product-specific steps.
cards.design_md: Three equal cards, active border pulse, short labels only.
cards.adapted_md: Use product copy from TextPlan; do not place the boxes over a noisy product photo.
cards.reference: Good-store feature row and process-card rhythm.

cards.when_to_use: Use when four concise points are needed, especially product selection or package overview.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD contains four cards. Adapted MD injects short labels and optionally category icons.
cards.design_md: Four equal cards, one active border at a time.
cards.adapted_md: Keep one row on desktop; verify mobile scaling from 390 px preview.

cards.when_to_use: Use only as a small attention marker inside a larger component.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD is a small pulse dot. Adapted MD places it beside one specific fact or icon.
cards.design_md: Single pulsing dot, no claim text.
cards.adapted_md: Tie the marker to one product fact, never as random decoration.
cards.reference: Small animated detail markers in live listing media.
cards.delivery: Small GIF or baked into composite PNG/GIF.

cards.when_to_use: Use for tech products when the scan line can point to a real material, connector, or parameter.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD is a clean scan window. Adapted MD either uses a real detail crop or keeps it abstract.
cards.design_md: Dark scan box, moving blue light bar.
cards.adapted_md: Use product detail crop only if it is clean; otherwise use abstract tech panel.
cards.reference: Tech listing banners with moving scan emphasis.

cards.when_to_use: Use when a text or proof board needs gentle emphasis without becoming noisy.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD has one dark card and slow glow border. Adapted MD replaces copy and color only.
cards.design_md: One clean card, slow border breathing.
cards.adapted_md: Use for a single module, not repeated in consecutive modules.
cards.reference: Colored trust cards and notice modules in live descriptions.
cards.delivery: GIF or static PNG if motion is unnecessary.

cards.when_to_use: Use to explain a process, not to imply measured performance.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD uses generic progress bars. Adapted MD labels the bars with process steps.
cards.design_md: Three horizontal bars with gentle fill motion.
cards.adapted_md: Labels must be process words such as Choose, Check, Use.

cards.when_to_use: Use only when the product has real before/after or clear comparison evidence.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD is a split wipe. Adapted MD requires two evidence-backed states.
cards.design_md: Neutral split wipe with comparison label.
cards.adapted_md: Insert before and after visuals only from source evidence.
cards.reference: Good-store comparison style, but stricter evidence guard.
cards.delivery: GIF only after evidence guard passes.

cards.when_to_use: Use when one clean product zone needs attention.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD is an abstract focus pulse. Adapted MD places it near a real product detail.
cards.adapted_md: Use a clean inset or keep abstract if product crop is noisy.
cards.reference: Small focus markers and magnifier-style listing details.

cards.when_to_use: Use for brand identity only, not for proof or certification.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD renders the wordmark locally. Adapted MD changes brand text only through approved brand config.
cards.design_md: Dark wordmark strip with slow shine.
cards.adapted_md: Replace EXCITAT/X-City only from brand config, never from image generation.
cards.delivery: GIF wordmark or static PNG fallback.

cards.when_to_use: Use as a brand or collection marker in a corner, not as a certification badge.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD has a corner ribbon. Adapted MD changes only brand/collection text and color.
cards.adapted_md: Attach to a banner or product card corner; keep text short.
cards.reference: Small brand markers in premium listing banners.

cards.when_to_use: Use when the module needs a small internal marker or product-family marker.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD is a small chip. Adapted MD defines the marker meaning in the SPEC.
cards.design_md: Small E2 chip with dark fill and gold border.
cards.adapted_md: Only use after marker meaning is defined in template selection or evidence index.
cards.reference: Small label chips in listing layouts.
cards.delivery: PNG or GIF if shine is required.

cards.when_to_use: Use when the buyer should read points in order.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD is a 1-4 strip. Adapted MD uses product-specific short labels.
cards.design_md: Four-card rank strip with active highlight.
cards.adapted_md: Use table or GIF depending on whether motion helps reading order.
cards.reference: Good-store feature rows and table grids.

cards.how_to_use: Design MD has Source / Spec / Image chips. Adapted MD links each chip to evidence.
cards.design_md: Three clean proof chips with check icons.
cards.adapted_md: Each chip must reference a source in evidence-index.
cards.reference: Trust chips and proof rows in marketplace details.
cards.delivery: PNG or baked into a board.

cards.when_to_use: Use when package quantity or included items are known.
cards.how_to_use: Design MD pulses package icons. Adapted MD sets exact item count and labels from source.
cards.design_md: Dark package row with small vertical micro-motion.
cards.adapted_md: Use only with verified package contents.
